PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX ql: <http://qlever.cs.uni-freiburg.de/builtin-functions/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?partyLabel(ql:median(?age) AS ?medianAge) WHERE {
  ?member p:P39 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P39 wd:Q223175 .
  ?statement pq:P2937 wd:Q104438161 .
  ?member wdt:P102 ?party .
  ?party rdfs:label ?partyLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?partyLabel) = "en")
  .
  ?member wdt:P569 ?dob .
  FILTER(datatype(?dob) = xsd:date)
  .
  BIND(2021 - YEAR(?dob) AS ?age)
}
GROUP BY ?partyLabel ?party
ORDER BY ?partyLabel
